ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Full name of the course */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the course is part of (e.g., Bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is offered (e.g., Verona) */,
  "start_year" TEXT /* Year the course started */,
  "end_year" TEXT /* Year the course ended */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total number of credits for the course */,
  "online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is offered online */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "corequisites" TEXT /* Corequisites for the course */,
  "recommended_background" TEXT /* Recommended background for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the module belongs to */,
  "module_credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the module */,
  "module_description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher offering the module */,
  "module_type" TEXT /* Type of module (e.g., theoretical, practical) */,
  "module_format" TEXT /* Format of the module (e.g., lecture, tutorial, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "teacher_title" TEXT /* Title of the teacher (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "teacher_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" TEXT /* Year the student enrolled in the program */,
  "student_status" TEXT /* Status of the student (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the enrollment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grading_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., written exam, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_modules" (
  "course_module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course-module relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_modules_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_modules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_modules" (
  "teacher_module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher-module relationship */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_modules_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_modules_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_assessments" (
  "module_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module assessment */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "assessment_weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_assessments_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_assessments" (
  "student_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "module_assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module assessment */,
  "assessment_result" REAL /* Result of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_assessments_module_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_assessment_id") REFERENCES module_assessments ("module_assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "course_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating of the course (1-5) */,
  "review_comment" TEXT /* Comment by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
